creator: matthias@petermann-it.de
text:
Ok, sounds great. Please let me know how I can support you.
Btw, I'm fine with the changes you did to the 2.4 ports - are you  
going to commit them?

Zitat von Boris Samorodov <bsam@passap.ru>:
